resources.string: Pru Health reads your daily step count to track progress toward your 10,000-step goal and calculate premium discount eligibility.
Pru Health reads walking and running distance to accurately measure your daily activity alongside step counts.
Pru Health reads exercise session data to calculate active minutes, which contribute to your healthy day streak.
Why Pru Health needs your health data

Pru Health reads steps, distance, and exercise data from Health Connect to:

• Track your daily step goal (10,000 steps = a Healthy Day)
• Calculate your premium discount after 75, 125, or 150 Healthy Days
• Sync your activity history so your progress is never lost

Your data is only used for your personal wellness journey and premium calculations. It is never sold or shared with third parties.
